personal.name: Shaun Prince
personal.title: Principal Cloud & AI Platform Architect
personal.summary: Principal Cloud & AI Platform Architect with 28+ years building and operating production systems — from bare metal Linux to GPU-accelerated AI inference. Co-founded TriNimbus (acquired by Rackspace). Founder of SolidRusT Networks, running a production AI inference platform on self-hosted Kubernetes with 550+ models on Hugging Face and 3.7M+ downloads. Ph.D. in Computer Science (applied agile methodologies), OSCP certified. Bilingual English/French.

experience.title: Founder & Principal AI Platform Architect
experience.summary: Building a production AI inference platform on self-hosted Kubernetes, serving multiple consumer applications with LLM inference, semantic search, knowledge graphs, and multi-agent orchestration.
highlights: 12-node Kubernetes cluster (Talos Linux) with 5 GPU nodes running NVIDIA RTX 3060s
vLLM inference engine with LiteLLM multi-provider routing, Milvus vector search, Neo4j knowledge graphs
550+ models published on Hugging Face with 3.7M+ all-time downloads
5 consumer products built on the platform: SolidRust.AI, Aidiant, MyAshes, AmiNex, Sentry game master
GitOps with FluxCD, production monitoring via Prometheus + Grafana, custom API gateway and billing platform

experience.title: Principal Cloud Solutions Architect
experience.summary: Owned all AWS infrastructure as the principal cloud architect, reporting directly to the Head of Engineering. Designed, prototyped, and implemented cloud platform components autonomously, with every PoC built as a production artifact from day one.
highlights: Architected Kafka on Amazon MSK — researched, prototyped with CI/CD pipeline, delivered production-ready for DevOps team handoff
Built Cognito + API Gateway authentication for player account management platform
Designed Java/Spring Boot service deployments on EKS with CloudFront distribution
Established pattern of dogfooding own CI/CD pipelines, structuring sandbox as working reference for receiving teams
Left in April 2026 due to company restructuring

experience.title: Senior Cloud Architect
experience.summary: Senior Cloud Architect at an AWS Advanced Partner and Microsoft Gold Partner, delivering digital transformation through microservices, cloud migration, and DevOps.
highlights: AWS Advanced Partner, Microsoft Gold Partner, Google Cloud Expert
Digital transformation engagements: microservices, cloud migration, DevOps

experience.title: Product Owner, ML Platform
experience.summary: Product Owner for the ML platform, managing the full MLOps lifecycle with Sagemaker, Airflow, Spark, and MLflow on AWS EKS.
highlights: Owned ML platform: Apache Airflow & Spark, MLflow, AWS Sagemaker
AWS EKS cluster management with Terraform, Helm, ArgoCD
CI/CD pipeline with Vault, Spring Config, Sonarqube, Dependency Track

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer, Project Lead
experience.summary: Led Data Science, Analytics, and AI infrastructure for Levi Strauss & Co. Built ML/deep learning pipelines on AWS with GPU compute.
highlights: AWS Sagemaker, Glue, Redis, Athena, RedShift, Aurora
Deep learning with EMR and NVIDIA GPU (PyTorch, TensorFlow, LightGBM)
AWS Batch/Fargate for ML workloads

experience.title: Principal Architect
experience.summary: Principal Architect for Java/Tomcat/JBoss/Oracle microservice migration to AWS with full CI/CD and monitoring.
highlights: Java microservice architecture on AWS (ECS Fargate and EC2)
CI/CD with Docker, Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, Gradle, SpringBoot
Monitoring with NewRelic, SumoLogic, Prometheus/Grafana on Kubernetes

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
experience.summary: Infrastructure as Code on AWS for a Ruby-based fintech stack with React frontend.
highlights: IaC on AWS with Python, Golang, TypeScript, Bash
React.js frontend on CloudFront/S3
Terraform, Kubernetes, CodeShip CI

experience.title: Core Operations Engineering Lead
experience.summary: Led team automating operational processes for multi-cloud customer environments across AWS, GCP, and Azure.
highlights: Automated customer onboarding/offboarding across AWS, GCP, Azure
Python, Chef, GitHub, CircleCI, Splunk, DataDog, PagerDuty
Acquired Relus Cloud Operations during tenure

experience.title: Co-Founder / Lead Solutions Architect
experience.summary: Co-founded TriNimbus, grew it to Canada's top AWS Premier Consulting Partner. Acquired by Rackspace in 2018 and rebranded as Onica. Led DevOps consulting and solutions architecture for enterprise clients.
highlights: Co-founded and grew to AWS Premier Consulting Partner status
Acquired by Rackspace (2018), rebranded as Onica
Enterprise clients: BC Hydro, Vancouver Airport Authority (YVR), PointClickCare, Safe Software
CI/CD pipelines, DevOps consulting with Ansible, Jenkins, Terraform, Kubernetes

experience.title: Senior Infrastructure Developer
experience.summary: Migrated Vivonet SaaS platform to AWS from on-premise Citrix XenServer, Cloudera, and VMware infrastructure.
highlights: AWS migration from Citrix XenServer, VMware ESX
Cloudera CDH/EDH (HDFS, HBase, Hive, Impala)
CI/CD with Puppet and Jenkins, monitoring with Nagios and NewRelic
